home.hero.title: Corporate ski retreats, elevated
home.hero.description: Your next company trip could be more than a morale exercise. We organize ski retreats that actually give teams something to talk about when they get back.
home.about.title: About us
home.about.description:
SlopeWorks started with a simple observation: the best conversations we ever had with colleagues didn't happen in meeting rooms. They happened on chairlifts, on mountain peaks, and over lunch that stretched way longer than planned.

There's something about being away from the office that changes how people talk to each other. Titles matter less. People say what they actually think. We've been on the receiving end of that enough times to want to build something around it.

So we did. SlopeWorks organizes corporate ski retreats for teams that want to do something worthwhile together, not just tick a box. We handle all of it. You just show up and ski.

home.packages.title: Our packages
home.packages.description: Three retreat formats, built around what your team actually needs.
home.packages.essential.title: Essential Retreats
home.packages.essential.description:
This one's for teams who want a proper ski trip without the production. We find the right resort, sort out the hotel or chalet, and have transfers, passes and rentals locked in before you land. No surprises on arrival, no group WhatsApp chaos figuring out who booked what.

The trip is what it should be: days on the mountain, good dinners, and time together that doesn't feel forced.
home.packages.essential.image.alt: Icon representing the Essential Retreat package
home.packages.premium.title: Premium Retreats
home.packages.premium.description:
More attention to where you stay and where you eat. We work with alpine hotels and smaller properties that have actual character, not just a star rating. Private transfers, restaurants we've actually been to, and a programme that fits around your group rather than the other way around.

Everything is sorted in advance. The trip feels easy because we made it easy.
home.packages.premium.image.alt: Icon representing the Premium Retreat package
home.packages.luxury.title: Luxury Retreats
home.packages.luxury.description:
For groups where the standard answer isn't good enough. We work with a small number of exceptional mountain properties, the kind that don't need to advertise. VIP transfers, private ski guides, exclusive dinners, fully bespoke planning.

Nothing about this is off the shelf. We build the programme around what your group actually expects.
home.packages.luxury.image.alt: Icon representing the Luxury Retreat package
